chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-951 of 2022 Mst. Akhtari Bano Versus Abdul Farid & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on Misc. No.4339/22 3. For orders on Misc. No.4340/22 4. For orders on Misc. No.1423/22 5. For hearing of main case. Dated: 07.02.2024 None present. -.-.- Since last several dates petitioner and her counsel have not attended the Court and today position is no better. There is no intimation either. It appears that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
